data.title: The Postgres® Vitality Index: Enterprises Rush to Postgres, and EDB Continues to Lead the Foundation for Sovereign Enterprise AI
data.description: Postgres emerges victorious as hyperscalers intensify their efforts, while EDB solidifies its position as a key contributor with over 30% involvement in a groundbreaking framework. EDB continues to lead the way in pioneering a sovereign AI platform vision. Based in WILMINGTON, Del., as of March 12, 2026, EnterpriseDB (EDB) maintains its status as the top sovereign AI and data firm in the industry.

data.title: NevGold Mobilizes Drill To Test Historical Leach Pads To Advance The Near-Term Antimony Production Scenario at Limo Butte
data.description: Vancouver, BC, March 12, 2026 - NevGold Corp. ("NevGold" or "the Company") has obtained permits and is mobilizing a drill rig to its Limousine Butte Project ("Project", "Limo Butte") in Nevada. The drilling will focus on testing the historical gold heap leach pads for antimony, aiming to advance them for near-term antimony production. This project represents one of the few near-term, at-surface antimony production opportunities in the US, with a potential path to antimony metal production by 2027. Nevgold is listed on the TSXV as NAU, OTCQX as NAUFF, and Frankfurt as 5E50.

data.title: Forrester Continues To Use AI To Transform How Research And Advisory Insights Are Delivered To Clients
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) has revealed that their Forrester AI tool, formerly known as Izola, is now certified for Microsoft Teams and can be accessed as an app in the Microsoft Marketplace. This Forrester AI Teams app is complimentary for existing clients of Forrester and offers a fresh avenue to obtain their exclusive research, data, and frameworks which are not accessible via public AI models. This development enables Forrester's clients to make more intelligent, well-informed, and data-driven decisions.

data.title: Pharma Leaders Discuss Managing Revenue Management System Updates at Model N Rainmaker Panel Hosted by RevSavvy
data.description: In response to heightened regulatory pressures, particularly with the implementation of IRA pricing reforms, there has been a notable uptick in the utilization of RevSavvy's ARC platform and consulting services by pharmaceutical firms. This is aimed at aiding these companies in effectively handling system upgrades, testing, and ensuring adherence to compliance standards. Based in Chicago, as of March 12, 2026, RevSavvy has witnessed a significant surge in adoption rates, reflecting the industry's need for support in this area.

data.title: Cartier Cuts 7.1 g/t Au over 8.0 m at Portal (Cadillac); New Shallow High-Grade Gold Zone Discovered
data.description: A significant discovery has been made by Cartier, with a high-grade zone yielding 7.1 grams per ton of gold over 8 meters at Portal on the Cadillac Project. This confirms the presence of a new shallow high-grade area near the historic ramp. The project is fully owned by Cartier and has shown promising results with this recent finding.

data.title: MaxLinear to Showcase Next‑Generation 1.6T Rushmore DSP Live at OFC 2026
data.description: In Carlsbad, California, MaxLinear showcases the latest 1.6T Rushmore DSP technology for AI data center optical and electrical connections at OFC 2026.

data.title: Blockchains are creating perp DEXs to attract traders, but only a few platforms likely to dominate liquidity.
data.description: Several chains are introducing perpetual decentralized exchanges (DEXs) in an attempt to attract trading activities. However, historical trends indicate that liquidity is likely to concentrate around a small number of platforms. This suggests that despite numerous chains entering the market, only a few will dominate trading volumes.

data.title: Express Celebrates Top Performers and Purpose‑Driven Leadership at International Leadership Conference in Nashville
data.description: Franchisees of Express Employment Professionals worldwide convened in Nashville, Tennessee for the 2026 International Leadership Conference. The event, held over three days, celebrated exceptional leadership and accomplishments.

data.title: SCAYLE Announces Partnership with Levi Strauss & Co.
data.description: HAMBURG, Germany and NEW YORK, March 12, 2026 - SCAYLE, a leading e-commerce platform, has officially partnered with Levi's®, a renowned apparel company and denim leader, to become the exclusive platform for levi.com. This global collaboration marks a significant milestone for both companies, with SCAYLE taking the reins as the worldwide hub for all Levi's® online operations. The partnership aims to enhance the digital shopping experience for Levi's® customers and expand their global reach through SCAYLE's extensive e-commerce network.

data.title: United Maritime Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: For the 13th quarter in a row, the company has successfully distributed a dividend to its shareholders. In a strategic move to bolster earnings and increase free cash flow, they have decided to increase their investments in Capesize vessels. This reallocation of capital demonstrates the company's commitment to enhancing financial performance.

data.title: NEXGEL Announces Consideration Terms of Agreement to License and Acquire Portfolio of Commercial-Stage Regenerative Biomaterial Products
data.description: The portfolio under review will be acquired for a total of $15 million in initial cash, with the possibility of earning an extra $20 million through milestone payments connected to net sales goals for the portfolio.

data.title: Propanc Biopharma Targets $3B+ Pancreatic Cancer Market with PRP: 85%+ Tumor Inhibition in Breakthrough Proenzyme Therapy
data.description: Traditional chemotherapy often faces challenges such as resistance, severe toxicity, and limited success rates. Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) treatment revolutionizes cancer treatment by offering a more effective and less harmful alternative.

data.title: Robin Energy Raised $13.9m at an Average Share Price of $4.31
data.description: On March 12, 2026, based in Limassol, Cyprus, Robin Energy Ltd. (NASDAQ: RBNE) disclosed that they have raised $13.9 million through their at the market ("ATM") program in the first quarter of 2026. The average price per share was $4.31, showing a 138% premium compared to the Company's closing share price on March 11, 2026. Robin Energy is an international company that owns ships and offers energy transportation services worldwide.
